name: Pack Of 24  - King Canned Dog Food - Beef Chunks in Gravy 400g
description: Provide your adult dog with a fully balanced, all-natural meal with King Adult Dog Food Canned -Beef . Carefully formulated by dog nutritionists, this savory canned food is rich in high-quality beef protein and essential nutrients to support your dog’s overall health and wellbeing. Key Benefits: High-quality protein: Supports muscle maintenance and energy for active adult dogs Balanced nutrition: Meets the complete nutritional requirements for adult dogs Hydration support: Moisture-rich formula (82%) helps keep dogs hydrated Vitamins & minerals: Includes Vitamin D3, Vitamin E, Zinc, Manganese, and Copper for strong bones, healthy skin, and immune support Easy to serve: Soft, palatable texture dogs enjoy Nutrient Components: Protein: 6.5% Fat: 3.5% Crude Ash: 2% Crude Fiber: 0.3% Moisture: 82% Ingredients: Meat and animal derivatives (4% beef), cereals, minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar Feeding Directions: Serve at room temperature. Always provide clean, fresh drinking water. Once opened, cover and refrigerate; use within 2 days. Not suitable for human consumption. Storage & Expiry: Check the bottom of the can for best before date and batch number.
